task_objective: Industrial Product Pattern Design & 9-View 3x3 - Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 designated area (FULLY PRESERVED), with material rendering + 3D print visualization

input_assets.structural_reference: Figure 1 Industrial Line Art - Auto-detect product shape/contour/structure - LOCKED
input_assets.aesthetic_reference: Figure 2 Inspiration - Style, patterns, textures, chromatic elements - applied to design_area ONLY

workflow.step_1: Auto-detect Figure 1 product structure + extract Figure 2 aesthetics
workflow.step_2: Apply Figure 2 aesthetics within design_area ONLY, generate sketch → aged brass render (SOURCE OF TRUTH) → material variations → 3D print visualizations
workflow.step_3: Assemble 9-view 3x3 grid, straight-on front view, macro product photography, soft grey background

outputs.view_1: Design Sketch - Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 aesthetics lineart sketch on [design_area], clean bg
outputs.view_2: Aged Brass Render - High-fidelity aged brass material render, matte finish with polished relief details. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_3: Polished Silver - Same design in mirror-polished silver, high reflectivity, cool metallic tone
outputs.view_4: Rose Gold - Same design in rose gold / copper tone, warm metallic, elegant patina
outputs.view_5: Walnut Wood - Same design in walnut wood craftsmanship, rich grain texture, warm brown tones
outputs.view_6: Acrylic - Same design in crystal-clear or tinted acrylic, transparent/translucent, modern glossy finish, light refraction, precision-cut edges
outputs.view_7: Ultra-White Depth Map - high-resolution industrial 3D model render, monochrome pure white material like industrial clay or high-density plastic, matte surface, preserve all original structure, proportions, and features, AO-enhanced shading for surface detail without color interference, 8K resolution, extreme detail fidelity, suitable for subsequent depth map generation
outputs.view_8: 3D Laser Print Depth Map - high-precision grayscale depth map optimized for laser 3D printing, near=bright (255) far=dark (0), 16-bit dynamic range, micron-level surface detail preserved, smooth gradient transitions, optimized Z-axis displacement, overhang <45°, minimum wall thickness SLA/SLS compliant, sharp edges and embossed patterns retained, pure height-field data, engineering-grade dimensional accuracy, slicer-ready output
outputs.view_9: Depth Map - industrial-grade high-precision grayscale depth map for 3D laser printing, near=bright far=dark, 16-bit dynamic range, raw Z-axis displacement with sub-millimeter accuracy, enhanced edge definition, smooth tonal gradients to prevent banding, manifold geometry ensured, sharp detail preservation, production-ready for SLA/SLS laser printing or laser engraving, engineering-calibrated depth values, no lighting, shading, or color

output_requirements: Figure 1 product structure LOCKED; Figure 2 aesthetics pixel-precise on central rectangular area ONLY
Text output:no text,Elegant premium typograph, refined kerning & hierarchy
Each material/visualization must produce physically accurate light interaction: reflections, shadows, surface texture, AO specific to that mode

Straight-on front view, macro product photography, soft grey background; no visible artifacts; consistent structural framework across all views,zero aesthetic bleed into surrounding structure; view_3-9 relief pattern 100% identical to view_2
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, luxury white space, industrial design presentation standard
